title: Mustardy Vietnamese Noodle Dish
description: A flavorful and aromatic Vietnamese noodle dish featuring a rich mustard sauce, fluffy noodles, and crunchy pickles, made with ovo-vegetarian friendly ingredients and a touch of granulated sugar.
instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
In a blender or food processor, combine the mustard paste, granulated sugar, and 2 tablespoons of water, and blend until smooth.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat and add the minced garlic, cooking until fragrant.
Add the blended mustard sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and toss to coat with the mustard sauce.
Push the noodles to one side of the skillet and crack in the eggs, scrambling them until cooked through.
Mix the eggs with the noodles and add the chopped scallions and pickle slices.
Season with salt to taste and serve immediately.
Garnish with additional scallions and pickle slices if desired.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
